ar.tool.description: Capture a photo from a USB camera via ffmpeg, or list available video devices. Supports Windows (dshow), Linux (v4l2), macOS (avfoundation).
ar.param.action.description: Action: capture (take a photo), list (show devices), or list_caps (show capabilities like resolutions and FPS for a device).
ar.param.devname.description: Device name/path (overrides index). On Linux use /dev/videoN. Use list action to find names.
ar.param.width.description: Capture width in pixels (e.g. 1920). Uses default if omitted.
ar.param.height.description: Capture height in pixels (e.g. 1080). Uses default if omitted.
ar.param.fps.description: Frames per second (e.g. 30). Uses default if omitted.
ar.param.outdir.description: Output directory for captured images. Default: outputs/usb_camera.

bn.param.devname.description: Device name/path (overrides index). On Linux use /dev/videoN. Use list action to find names.
bn.param.width.description: Capture width in pixels (e.g. 1920). Uses default if omitted.
bn.param.height.description: Capture height in pixels (e.g. 1080). Uses default if omitted.
